candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A component tied to cost of revenues, but it appears to be a sub-component of the already selected parent COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' / cost-of-revenue totals rather than a separate same-level expense to add later.

This is an explicit D&A component tied to cost of revenues, but it appears to sit within the cost-of-revenue bucket already captured by the selected parent row 'Cost of Operating Revenue', so adding it separately would risk double counting.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The visible D&A rows for cost of revenues look like component lines within that bucket, not separate operating lines outside it. Therefore no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

No SG&A-related depreciation/amortisation row is visible in the operating section excerpt. The only explicit D&A rows shown are for cost of revenues, which are not relevant to the selected XSGA bucket 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses'.
